name: Mom's Punch
recipeIngredient: 2 quarts frozen lemonade concentrate (6 oz each)
1 quart mold with fruit juice (any type)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cranberry juice and lemonade into a punch bowl.
2. Place the frozen mold in the center of the punch bowl.
3. Add 1 bottle of ginger ale to the mold.
4. Add the sherbet to the punch bowl.
5. Stir gently until combined.
6. Serve immediately for a refreshing, tart punch.
Randy Rigg
